basic_info.description: 👋 はじめまして、Mugunthan Saravananです。機械学習とAndroidアプリ開発愛好家で、強固な学術的背景と実践経験を有しています。新しい技術を迅速に習得し、現実世界の問題解決に適用する能力が実証されています。Pythonに熟練しており、Java、C、C++に関する実用的な知識を有しています。Download my resume

projects.title: Sales Forecasting
projects.description: The Sales Prediction Project is a web application that uses Angular, Flask, and Firebase to predict sales data. The web application is user-interactive, allowing users to input different sales data and see the predicted results. The predicted sales data is saved in Firebase, and it is visualized in graphs.

projects.title: Sign Language to English
projects.description: The application should be able to translate sign language gestures into English text in real time, allowing for fluent and natural communication between sign language users and non-signers. Accuracy and fluency: The translation should be accurate and fluent, capturing the nuances of the sign language and conveying the intended meaning effectively.
